relations: Plato introduced the story of Atlantis in his dialogues, making him the primary source of the legend
The dialogue where Atlantis is first mentioned by Plato
The dialogue where the story of Atlantis is further elaborated by Plato
Atlantis was described by Plato as being located beyond the Pillars of Hercules, indicating its supposed position relative to the known world
Some theories suggest Atlantis was located in the Atlantic Ocean
Some theories suggest Atlantis was located in the Mediterranean Sea
Some theories suggest Atlantis was located in Antarctica
